title: lyonia axillaris
intro: Lyonia axillaris, also known as the fragrant sassafras or mountain frost, is a deciduous shrub native to the southeastern United States. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lyonia axillaris include its ability to treat various health issues such as arthritis, fever, and skin conditions, due to its content of essential oils like borneol and bornyl acetate. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties and health benefits.
